prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap for formaldehyde was computed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set, also known as tier `standard`. The calculation was performed in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1 using PySCF as the backend. The geometry was taken from the provided file and not optimized during this run (fixed geometry). The resulting HOMO energy is -7.6523 eV, the LUMO energy is -1.7826 eV, and the computed HOMO–LUMO gap is 5.8697 eV. SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings were reported during this run, and the calculation is considered trustworthy according to the integrity checks. The raw calculation log was written live to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmptqmysidp/live.json`.
